---
title: "Fitting N-mixture models"
subtitle: "Point count data analysis workshop 2025"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Péter Sólymos"
toc: true
format:
  html: 
    html-math-method: katex
    self-contained: true
  pdf: default
---

```{r}
#| include: false
# options(width = 53, scipen = 999)
library(knitr)
```

# Preamble

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
    library(unmarked)
    library(detect)
    library(dplyr)
    library(ggplot2)
    theme_set(theme_light())
})
set.seed(1234)
```

https://github.com/psolymos/detect/blob/master/extras/revisitingSV/simuls6.R
